changes_made: Replaced verbose generic SQL reference with focused SQLite-specific workflow
Added explicit CSV header stripping with tail -n +2 (macOS sqlite3 does not auto-skip headers)
Added Python script pattern for JSON output (write to .py file, run with python3, never write Python into .json files)
Replaced dict comprehensions with explicit for-loops (qwen3-30b generates broken comprehension syntax)
Added staging table normalization pattern with CAST for text-to-numeric conversion
Added explicit verification steps (count rows, check schema, cat output JSON)
key_failure_modes_addressed: macOS sqlite3 does not support --skip 1 flag and does not auto-skip CSV headers for existing tables
qwen3-30b generates broken dict comprehensions: [{key: val for r in rows] missing closing brace
qwen3-30b writes Python code directly into .json output files instead of creating .py scripts
qwen3-30b uses abbreviated column names (name, project) instead of exact CSV headers (employee_name, project_name)
qwen3-30b gets stuck in edit loops when trying to fix syntax errors it cannot see
